summary: Batch decomp PR matching six functions and improving twelve unmatched items across camera, fighter, game-mode, ground, interface, menu, and toy/display/list code. The PR body names verification with require-protos, ninja, and a GALE01 report; the bot report confirms six new 100% matches and listed score improvements.

key_files.role: Matched Camera_80030E44 by changing cm_80452C68 access shape from a local Camera* alias to direct global field accesses.
Matched ftAction_80073008 by removing PAD_STACK/todo, changing local types/order, computing dmg_mult, and casting color_anim at the callsite.
Matched fn_8017A9B4 by introducing a small static inline helper for repeated HSD_ImageDesc initialization and lb_800121FC calls.
Changed file for matched un_80318B1C and .sdata2 improvement; exact diff details were not present in the loaded excerpt.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: GALE01 6 new matches and .sdata2 improvement

key_files.role: Matched ftNn_Init_80123954 with local declaration/lifetime changes, removal of PAD_STACK, extracted dxsq/dysq temporaries, explicit cast in distance comparison, and adjusted Ice Climbers transition calls.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: GALE01 6 new matches and .sdata2 improvement

key_files.role: Matched gm_801A9DD0 by changing the third parameter to u16, reshaping local initialization, using Scissor-compatible viewport fields with a cast to HSD_RectS16*, and naming projection constants as locals.
Updated gm_801A9DD0 prototype to match the recovered body signature, changing the third parameter from int to u16.
Improved gmCamera_801A292C by using gmCameraUnkStruct*, a table pointer, gmCamera_801A25C8 helper call, and MIN macro for x44 clamping.
Improved fn_80175A94 with changed result display field/index accesses, if/else control flow in place of switch, and call argument reshaping; bot report shows 8.25% to 99.66%.
Improved grInishie2_801FD9EC with local ordering changes, GET_GROUND access, temp_vec reuse, and HSD_JObj translation helper calls.
Improved ftKb_SpecialN_800EED50 by casting ftKb_Init_803CB46C[arg0] to u8 for efAsync_LoadSync.
Improved ft_800852B0 by changing costume-list iteration/indexing, using derived ftData_UnkCountStruct pointers, and introducing a zero-valued local used in loop and reset call.
Changed file for improved un_802FF570; exact diff details were not present in the loaded excerpt.
Changed file for improved fn_802FA6C4; exact diff details were not present in the loaded excerpt.
Changed file for improved un_80303FD4; exact diff details were not present in the loaded excerpt.
Changed file for improved mn_8022FB88; exact diff details were not present in the loaded excerpt.
Changed file for improved un_803147C4; exact diff details were not present in the loaded excerpt.
Header changed alongside ty files; exact symbol-level intent was not present in the loaded excerpt.

what_changed: PR body claims six matches: Camera_80030E44, ftAction_80073008, fn_8017A9B4, un_80318B1C, ftNn_Init_80123954, and gm_801A9DD0.
Bot report confirms six new 100.00% matches and overall matched code increase of +2216 bytes.

PR body claims additional improvements for mn_8022FB88, grInishie2_801FD9EC, un_803147C4, un_80303FD4, un_802FF570, gmCamera_801A292C, ftKb_SpecialN_800EED50, fn_802FA6C4, ft_800852B0, and fn_80175A94.
Bot report lists twelve improved unmatched items, including .sdata2 score movement in ftNana and tydisplay.
gm_801A9DD0 body and gmopening.h prototype were updated together so the recovered u16 third parameter is reflected in the header.

Several diffs are match-shaping cleanups: removing PAD_STACK from matched functions, changing local lifetimes/order/types, adding casts, replacing a manual clamp with MIN, using helper/inline forms, and adjusting access paths.
smart_moves: Kept the header synchronized with the recovered gm_801A9DD0 signature and explicitly listed python configure.py --require-protos in verification.
Removed PAD_STACK from ftAction_80073008 and ftNn_Init_80123954 as part of reaching 100% matches rather than leaving stack padding as permanent source.
Introduced a small static inline helper in gmresultplayer.c to express two repeated image descriptor setup sequences for fn_8017A9B4.
Used the existing MIN macro in gmCamera_801A292C instead of preserving a manual if-clamp ladder.
Preserved address-style names such as fn_*/un_* for unknown functions while still landing matches and score improvements.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered body proves a narrower parameter type, update the owning header in the same PR and run require-protos.
Stack padding is not always required for matched output; in this PR, local type/order/lifetime changes removed PAD_STACK in two functions that the report says reached 100%.
Repeated setup sequences can sometimes be expressed as a small static inline helper and still match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static inline inline1 and two calls

decomp_lessons.lesson: Common macros can improve both readability and match shape when they express the source operation; gmCamera_801A292C replaced a manual clamp with MIN and improved from 73.24% to 93.02%.

naming_conventions.convention: Keep address-style fn_/un_ names when the PR evidence does not establish semantics.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: match and improvement symbol lists

naming_conventions.convention: Use short role locals where the role is clear, such as nana_fp, popo_fp, attrs, gp, jobj, text, and tbl.

Some temporary match-shaping locals remained generic, such as new_var/new_var2/new_var3/new_var4; the PR evidence supports that they were part of a score improvement, not that they are preferred naming style.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjust access path from a local struct pointer alias to direct global field access for codegen.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.example: Camera_80030E44 changed Camera* camera = &cm_80452C68 uses to cm_80452C68.xA0/_8C/_B0 direct accesses.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use explicit casts at callsites or comparisons to shape conversions.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.example: ftKb_SpecialN_800EED50 casts table entry to u8 for efAsync_LoadSync; ftAction_80073008 casts color_anim to s32; ftNn_Init_80123954 casts a float product to s32 in the distance comparison.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Change local declaration order, lifetimes, and temporary extraction to influence register/stack allocation.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.example: ftNn_Init_80123954 hoists nana_fp and attrs, extracts dxsq/dysq, and removes PAD_STACK; gm_801A9DD0 names roll/near/far/top/bottom locals.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Replace repeated source blocks with a helper/inline when the repeated operation has matching structure.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.example: fn_8017A9B4 introduces inline1 for player_img1/player_img2 image descriptor setup.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use project macros for canonical expressions instead of branch ladders.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.example: gmCamera_801A292C replaces manual x44 clamp with unk->x44 = MIN(unk->x30, unk->x40).

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use helper/accessor macros where the diff shows they produce better code shape.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.example: grInishie2_801FD9EC changes selected gobj->user_data/gp field reads to GET_GROUND(gobj) and reuses temp_vec for HSD_JObjSetTranslate/GetTranslation.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Header prototypes should follow recovered body signatures
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2575, gm_801A9DD0 changed its third parameter from int to u16 in both gmopening.c and gmopening.h, and the PR body listed python configure.py --require-protos as verification.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Try local type/order/lifetime fixes before preserving PAD_STACK
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2575 removed PAD_STACK from ftAction_80073008 and ftNn_Init_80123954 while changing locals and reached 100% for both functions in the GALE01 report.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Small static inline helpers can express repeated setup and still match
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2575 matched fn_8017A9B4 by introducing inline1 for two repeated HSD_ImageDesc initialization/lb_800121FC sequences.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use canonical macros when they fit the operation
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2575 improved gmCamera_801A292C by replacing a manual clamp with MIN(unk->x30, unk->x40).

rejection_notes: Do not promote generic locals named new_var/new_var2/etc. as a naming convention; they appear in the diff as match-shaping temporaries, not supported style guidance.
Do not infer semantic names or behavior for fn_/un_ symbols beyond the PR's listed match/improvement status.
Do not claim exact tactics for files whose diffs were not loaded in full; use follow-up queries for if, mn, ty, and toy details.
